regime_fall.current_status: Day 42 escalation has reached maximum intensity with US and Israeli forces destroying 13,000+ targets across Iran on April 7-8, 2026, while Trump's contradictory diplomatic posturing (5-day pause through April 6, followed by renewed threats) collides with Iran's systematic rejection of multiple ceasefire and peace proposals, hardline consolidation, and public exhaustion over civilian casualties and infrastructure destruction.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US and Israeli forces destroyed over 13,000 targets across Iran on April 7-8, 2026, including Kharg Island oil infrastructure, eight strategic bridge segments, IRGC headquarters, and facilities near Bushehr nuclear plant, marking the most intensive phase of the 42-day escalation following Iran's rejection of ceasefire and peace proposals.
